outreach.subject: Partnership opportunity: The Wealth Dojo Experience
outreach.body:
Hello Calgary Black Chambers team,

The Wealth Dojo Experience is bringing practical wealth-building education and community connection to Calgary. Because of your work supporting Black professionals and entrepreneurs, we see a strong opportunity to collaborate on audience reach, programming, or event partnership.

Would you be open to a short conversation about alignment and possible involvement?

Best regards,
The Wealth Dojo Team

documents.title: Volunteer onboarding SOP
documents.body:
# Volunteer onboarding SOP

## Purpose
Give every volunteer a consistent path from application to event-day readiness.

## Steps
1. Review application and confirm availability.
2. Hold a 15-minute intro call and record the outcome.
3. Send the welcome pack (draft-only until approved).
4. Assign a role and shift.
5. Confirm attendance at the training session on Sep 12.

## Owner
Experience Operations Coordinator.

documents.title: Event day run-of-show template
documents.body:
# Run-of-show template

| Time | Segment | Owner | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| 08:00 | Volunteer arrival and briefing | Coordinator | |
| 09:00 | Doors open, registration | Registration lead | |
| 10:00 | Opening keynote | Founder | |
| 12:00 | Lunch and networking | Catering | |
| 13:00 | Workshops | Speakers | |
| 16:00 | Closing and thank-yous | Founder | |
| 17:00 | Teardown | All volunteers | |

documents.title: Sponsor outreach process
documents.body:
# Sponsor outreach process

1. Research and verify the organization with at least one cited source.
2. Score fit and add to the pipeline at the Research stage.
3. Draft outreach — every draft is approval-gated and never auto-sent.
4. After human approval and sending, move the sponsor to Contacted.
5. Log every interaction in the pipeline notes.

improvements.idea: Centralize all event documents in one shared drive structure
Automate volunteer shift reminders 48 hours before the event

strategies.title: RESET launch strategy
strategies.audience: Calgary professionals aged 24–40 interested in financial literacy, entrepreneurship, and community — with emphasis on Black and newcomer communities.
strategies.positioning: The Wealth Dojo Experience | RESET is Calgary's practical, community-rooted wealth-building day: real tools, real conversations, no jargon.
strategies.summary: Lead with partner networks and Instagram storytelling for awareness, convert through Eventbrite and email nurture, and use early-bird urgency in the final four weeks.

campaigns.name: Early-bird ticket push
campaigns.objective: Sell the first 100 tickets before Aug 15 with early-bird pricing.
campaigns.metrics: Tickets sold, link clicks, cost per ticket

contentCalendar.title: Early-bird launch email to community list

commsDrafts.subject: Welcome to The Wealth Dojo Experience team
commsDrafts.body:
Hi Amara,

Welcome to the RESET volunteer team! You are confirmed as our Registration lead.

Next steps:
- Review the volunteer onboarding guide (attached).
- Save the date: training session Sep 12, event day Sep 26.
- Reply to confirm your shift: 8:00–14:00 on event day.

Thank you for helping us build this experience.

The Wealth Dojo Team
